data.title: Bitget will launch Babylon (BABY) spot trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bitget will launch Babylon (BABY) in the Innovation Zone and DeFi Zone. The recharge channel is now open, and the trading channel will be open at 18:00 (UTC+8) on April 10.

data.title: Former U.S. Treasury Secretary Warns of Potential Financial Crisis
data.description: According to BlockBeats, former U.S. Treasury Secretary Lawrence Summers has expressed concerns that the United States may be heading towards a significant financial crisis. Summers' remarks highlight growing apprehensions about the stability of the financial system.

data.title: European Stock Markets Experience Significant Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, European stock markets saw a notable downturn with the German DAX index dropping by as much as 4%. The French CAC40 index fell by 4.1%, while the Europe Stoxx 600 index decreased by 4.2%. This decline reflects broader market concerns impacting European equities.

data.title: In the past 4 hours, the entire network has exploded more than 35 million US dollars, mainly in long orders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past 4 hours, the entire network has been liquidated for $35.2628 million, of which long orders have been liquidated for $23.0603 million and short orders have been liquidated for $12.2025 million.

data.title: New York lawmaker proposes blockchain for 'uncensored truth' in elections
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: With the new White House administration taking office, state legislators in the United States are considering adopting blockchain technology in many ways. New York State Assemblyman Clyde Vanel has submitted a bill to explore the use of blockchain technology to ensure election fairness and combat voter fraud. The proposal submitted by Vanel to the State Assembly Election Law Committee will instruct the New York State Election Commission to evaluate the use of on-chain systems to present "uncensored truth" in the democratic decision-making process. If the proposal is approved, the election commission will be required to study related activities in other states and submit research results within 12 months. The draft submitted on Tuesday is under review by the committee. If supported after revisions and debate, the bill will be submitted to the state assembly for further discussion, then to the New York State Senate, and finally to the governor's office. The governor's signature is the last step before any potential legislation becomes law. Since 2017, four versions of Vanel's election bill have been introduced in the New York State Assembly, but none of them have been approved by the governor. (The Block)

data.title: Arthur Hayes: If the U.S. Treasury cancels its bond auctions, it could exacerbate money supply expansion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes wrote, "If the U.S. Treasury decides to cancel the upcoming 10-year and 30-year Treasury auctions, this is a covert act of printing money because he will instead consume the TGA (Treasury General Account). This is a simple intermediate step to calm the chaos before the "coward" Powell performs his duties."

data.title: Cardano founder: The next generation of crypto projects needs to build more collaborative token economics and market structures
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson said that the next generation of cryptocurrency projects need to adopt a more collaborative strategy to counter large centralized technology companies that are entering the Web3 field. He pointed out that the cryptocurrency and DeFi fields are often limited by the "circular economy", that is, the rise of one cryptocurrency is often at the expense of the outflow of funds from another token, which hinders the growth of the entire industry. In order to effectively respond to the competition from centralized technology giants in the Web3 field, cryptocurrency projects need to build a more collaborative token economics and market structure. 
Hoskinson said that the current token economics and market structure in the cryptocurrency field are mutually opposed and need to shift to a cooperative balance. Existing projects often sacrifice others for development, which is not conducive to the progress of the industry, and it is difficult to prevent giants such as Apple and Google from entering the market in the future. He expects that the US market structure bill may be passed before September, when giants will flock in, and the cryptocurrency field must build infrastructure to cope with it. To this end, Cardano is developing a multi-resource consensus protocol Minotaur to unify payment block rewards. (Cointelegraph)
